scripts.build: npm run -w @smp/common build && npm run -w @smp/db build && npm run -w @smp/sync-service build && npm run -w @smp/order-dispatcher build && npm run -w @smp/matching-api build
scripts.debug:api: set MATCH_PG_HOST=localhost&& set MATCH_PG_PORT=5433&& set API_PORT=8081&& npm run -w @smp/matching-api debug
scripts.debug:sync: set MATCH_PG_HOST=localhost&& set MATCH_PG_PORT=5433&& npm run -w @smp/sync-service debug
scripts.debug:dispatch: set MATCH_PG_HOST=localhost&& set MATCH_PG_PORT=5433&& npm run -w @smp/order-dispatcher debug
